name: Cheddar Rice Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine cooked rice, shredded cheddar cheese, minced onion, all-purpose flour, salt, and black pepper. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
3. Fold the beaten egg whites into the rice mixture.
4. Coat a large skillet with vegetable cooking spray and place on medium heat until hot.
5. Spoon 2 to 3 tablespoons of the rice mixture into the skillet for each patty. Push the mixture into the desired shape using a spatula.
6. Cook patties, turning once, until golden brown on both sides.
7. Serve warm with applesauce and sour cream.
